name: AuAu: A Benchmark for Auditing Authoritarian Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2606.16127v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The worldwide rise of authoritarianism and the growing role of Large Language Models (LLMs) in users' everyday lives raise the question of...
description: arXiv:2606.16127v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The worldwide rise of authoritarianism and the growing role of Large Language Models (LLMs) in users' everyday lives raise the question of whether specific models exhibit or promote authoritarian attitudes. We introduce AuAu, a comprehensive benchmark for assessing the risk of authoritarian tendencies in LLM responses. AuAu combines thre...
author: Andreas Einwiller, Max Klabunde, Florian Lemmerich
